title: Paracelsus in the Corpus
subtitle: The evented footprint of Theophrastus von Hohenheim

narrative.intro: The corpus's Paracelsus events — publications, appointments, condemnations. For the curated, sourced life-route, see the companion journey map.
narrative.provenance_note: Events involving Paracelsus (14 in corpus). Complements the curated journey-paracelsus map, which is the sourced itinerary.
narrative.design_note: Copperplate Engraving: Paracelsus's afterlife is a print phenomenon — surgery books, pamphlet wars — so the map wears the printed page.
